inputs.label: Number of Folds (k)
inputs.businessContext: Number of folds used in k-fold cross-validation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of folds used in k-fold cross-validation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: k-katlı çapraz doğrulamada kullanılan kat sayısı.

inputs.label: Mean Performance Score
inputs.businessContext: Average of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1) across all folds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1) across all folds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm katlar arasında performans metriğinin (örn. doğruluk, F1) ortalaması.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Performance Scores
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the performance metric across folds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of the performance metric across folds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katlar arasında performans metriğinin standart sapması.

inputs.label: Total Sample Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of samples in the dataset (for context, not used in formulas).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of samples in the dataset (for context, not used in formulas).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri setindeki toplam örnek sayısı (bağlam için, formüllerde kullanılmaz).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
